title: Monday Reset
highlight: Set intentions for the week and felt cautiously optimistic.
content:
New week, new energy. Well... medium energy. But that is okay.

Set three intentions for the week:
1. Be more present during conversations
2. Take a walk every day, even a short one
3. Write in this journal at least three times

The morning coffee catch-up with Jamie was great. We talked about travel plans and it made me excited for summer.
